always.why: Baseline for every shoulder assessment; screens deformity, muscle wasting (cuff/deltoid), scapular position.
always.confirmsOrExcludes: Screens gross deformity, wasting, scapular dyskinesis

always.why: First objective movement test; establishes willingness, range and painful arc.
Differentiates contractile vs inert restriction; capsular pattern points to adhesive capsulitis/OA.
always.confirmsOrExcludes: Confirms/excludes capsular pattern (adhesive capsulitis, GH OA)

always.why: Isolates contractile lesions; weak+painful resisted abduction/ER implicates rotator cuff.

add.exam: Subacromial cluster (Hawkins-Kennedy, Neer, painful arc, empty can)
add.why: Overhead aggravation raises subacromial pain probability; cluster of 3+ positives materially increases likelihood.

add.exam: Full-thickness cuff tests (ER lag, drop-arm, lift-off)
add.why: Traumatic onset raises tear probability; lag/drop-arm signs indicate full-thickness tear needing possible imaging.

add.exam: Capsular pattern mapping (passive ER vs Abd vs IR)
add.why: Progressive global stiffness suggests adhesive capsulitis; document ER>Abd>IR loss.
Paraesthesia mandates excluding cervical radiculopathy referring to the shoulder before local diagnosis.
Radiation below the elbow is atypical for local shoulder pathology; screen cervical spine and neural tissue.
Traumatic onset in a younger patient raises instability probability.

supporting.why: Cheap, quick localiser for AC joint pathology; include when pain is localised superiorly.

supporting.exam: Biceps tests (Speed's, palpation of bicipital groove)
supporting.why: Screens long head of biceps involvement, common co-existing pain generator.
Quantifies baseline disability for goal-setting and re-assessment.

supporting.exam: Imaging (only if red flag, suspected full-thickness tear, or calcific tendinopathy)
supporting.why: Imaging is not routine; reserve for red flags, lag-sign positive tears, or suspected calcific deposit.
supporting.confirmsOrExcludes: Confirms structural pathology when clinically indicated
